## Feature Description

A clear description of the feature you'd like.

## Use Case

Why do you need this? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution

How you think it should work.

## Example Usage

```bash
python scripts/scraper.py scrape "URL"
```

## Additional Context

Any other context or references.
